name: Tangy Roast Beef Pockets-NHB
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the honey, horseradish, and Dijon mustard.
2. Set aside.
3. Divide the biscuit dough into 8 biscuits.
4. Roll each biscuit out to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
5. On each of four biscuits, spread about 1/4 of the cream cheese, stopping 1/2 inch from the edge.
6. Top each evenly with the chopped roast beef, pimentos, and honey-horseradish sauce.
7. Moisten the edge of each biscuit with water.
8. Place a remaining biscuit on top of each to seal the edges together. Press firmly with a fork.
9. Prick the top of each completed pocket a few times with a fork.
10. Place the pockets on an ungreased baking sheet and bake at 400°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
[akes 4 servings. Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 746 Sodium: 2923 mg Carbohydrates: 76.1 g Protein: 38.8 g Cholesterol: 86.3 mg Dietary Fiber: 2.94 g Total Fat: 33.3 g Cal. from Fat: 39%]
